title: Provider-neutral executor expansion
description_md:
## What
Make the harness genuinely provider-neutral.
## Why
ADR 0011 promised it; only codex/claude exist today.
design_md:
## Key problems
- No provider-adapter contract; raw string match at main.rs:4284.
- HP-1: no canonical event model (provider_turn_events.jsonl stores raw payload).
## Big picture
Introduce a ProviderAdapter trait both spawn paths route through.
acceptance_md:
## Real acceptance
Actually run `provider=kimi` as a workflow leaf AND as a persistent member, visible in the dashboard.

explorations.author: explorer-ephemeral
explorations.notes_md: Mapped the ephemeral spawn path: spawn_codex_ephemeral / spawn_claude_ephemeral, shared run_ndjson_child.

explorations.author: explorer-member
explorations.notes_md: Mapped the member delivery path: run_provider_delivery, codex exec resume / claude --resume.
